creator: loic.blot@unix-experience.fr
text:
Hello,
i'm working on containerd in order to try to make it work with Kubelet, and i saw that it's a pretty trivial port for now.

Here is a GH PR adding:

* a default sample config, which doesn't publish to /run
* containerd_flags rc.d permitting to use a configuration file or other flags

https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-ports/pull/160
